mapper.select:
SELECT c.id as id, c.name as name, c.campaign_type as "campaignType", c.description as description, c.discount_type as "discountType", c.discount_value as "discountValue", c.start_date as "startDate", c.end_date as "endDate", c.budget as budget, c.spent as spent, c.revenue as revenue, c.usage_count as "usageCount", c.min_order_amount as "minOrderAmount", c.max_discount_amount as "maxDiscountAmount", c.state_id as "stateId", c.flow_id as "flowId", (c.budget - c.spent) as "remainingBudget", CASE WHEN c.spent > 0 THEN (c.revenue / c.spent) ELSE 0 END as "roi" FROM campaign c
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND c.campaign_type = #{campaignType} AND c.discount_type = #{discountType} AND c.state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT c.state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count", COALESCE(SUM(c.budget), 0) as "totalBudget", COALESCE(SUM(c.spent), 0) as "totalSpent", COALESCE(SUM(c.revenue), 0) as "totalRevenue", COALESCE(SUM(c.usage_count), 0) as "totalUsage" FROM campaign c GROUP BY c.state_id
SELECT count(DISTINCT c.state_id) FROM campaign c
